feedback_files.tests/test_feedback_delayed_disconnect.p:
from lease_runtime.coordinator import WorkerCoordinator
from lease_runtime.registry import LeaseRegistry
from lease_runtime.task_queue import TaskQueue


def test_delayed_disconnect_only_retires_work_from_that_connection():
    registry = LeaseRegistry()
    queue = TaskQueue()
    coordinator = WorkerCoordinator(registry, queue)
    retired = coordinator.connect("worker-19")
    queue.add("retired-job", {"batch": "old"})
    assert coordinator.assign("retired-job", retired)

    _, replacement = coordinator.replace("worker-19")
    queue.add("replacement-job", {"batch": "new"})
    assert coordinator.assign("replacement-job", replacement)

    assert coordinator.disconnect(retired) == 1

    assert registry.is_active(replacement)
    assert queue.get("retired-job").state == "pending"
    new_task = queue.get("replacement-job")
    assert (new_task.state, new_task.owner_generation) == (
        "leased",
        replacement.generation,
    )
    assert not coordinator.complete("replacement-job", retired)
    assert coordinator.complete("replacement-job", replacement)
